requirementCueLines: Completion of at least 60 college level credits on the quarter system with a minimum 2.75 cumulative GPA
Completion of an English Composition course with a minimum 2.0 grade
A minimum 2.75 cumulative GPA* in the business prerequisite courses

*The minimum acceptable grade in each prerequisite course and English composition is 2.0 grade . Business prerequisites may not be taken P/F or S/NS. Contact us for questions related to use of S/NS during quarters deemed extraordinary [affected by COVID-19] by the University of Washington and/or transfer institutions.

Effective Autumn quarter 2023 admission applicants to the accounting option no longer have an additional requirement of a minimum 2.5 in each accounting course and a cumulative 3.0 across all accounting courses.
Cultural experiences (e.g. How will you enrich the diversity of the Milgard School and UW Tacoma?)
This applies to the UW Tacoma Milgard School of Business applicants only . Please check the website for UW Bothell and UW Seattle admission requirements.

At the time of application, you must have a minimum of five prerequisites (English composition and 4 business prerequisites) complete with final grades on your transcripts. All business prerequisites must be completed prior to the start of the quarter of admission. Refer to the course list in this table to determine if you have the necessary coursework to submit an application.
English Composition (TCORE 101; TWRT 120 and TWRT 121; or TWRT 211)
TURB 225 or TSOCWF 351 may meet this requirement
Micro or Macro complete at the time of application
